summary: An exemplary test suite that provides thorough coverage at the unit, integration, and end-to-end levels. The unit tests rigorously check boundary conditions and parsing rules for semantic versioning and commit messages. The end-to-end suite strictly follows the complex instructions regarding the use of `act`, temporary git repositories, specific file appends (`act-result.txt`), and exact regex assertions on stdout. Test design is very clean, utilizing isolated fixtures and clear teardown logic.
